title: Die Entlassung
writer: Alexander Lernet-Holenia, Curt J. Braun, Otto von Bismarck
actors: Emil Jannings, Margarete Schön, Christian Kayßler
plot: A sequel to 1940's "Bismarck", Bismarck is dismissed by an under-pressure Wilhelm II. Then the treaty with Russia is in peril as the leader is left with the dilemma of who could complete Bismarck's work.
